personal.name: Van-An Hoang
personal.title: AI Research Engineer & Machine Learning Specialist
personal.description: Passionate about Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Generative AI

paragraphs: I'm an AI Research Engineer currently pursuing a Master's in Artificial Intelligence at the University of Technology Sydney. With over 2 years of professional experience in machine learning and computer vision, I specialize in deploying production-ready AI systems that solve real-world problems.

My expertise spans deep generative models, computer vision, and MLOps. I've successfully deployed semantic search engines, developed automated review systems using Vision-Language Models, and contributed to cutting-edge research in diffusion models. I'm passionate about bridging the gap between research and production, creating AI solutions that are both technically sound and commercially viable.

experience.title: Junior/Intermediate AI Research Engineer
experience.company: Pixta - Largest marketplace online site of stock media in Asia
responsibilities: AutoReview Project: Engineered unified MLOps pipeline using ClearML, integrating AWS S3, DynamoDB, MySQL, and BigQuery for streamlined data processing
Evaluated and integrated multiple Vision-Language Models (MiniCPM-V 2.6, Qwen2-VL, Gemini 2.0/2.5) for abstract image understanding and trademark recognition
Developed novel image processing algorithm achieving 85% recall for NG cases and 92% recall for accepted cases, saving ~$1,500/month in manual review costs
AI Search Project: Architected semantic search backend using OpenSearch and Weaviate with HNSW-PQ indexing, powering public "AI Search" feature on pixta.jp
Achieved 90% search result acceptance rate from internal labeling team through vision-language fusion approach
Deployed autoscaling, asynchronous inference endpoints on AWS SageMaker with robust CI/CD pipeline
Integrated multi-modal models (RAM++, Tag2Text, Osprey) for rich semantic descriptions combining lexical tags with pixel-level visual understanding
Built multi-stage detection pipeline combining COCO-baseline models with YOLO-World for open-vocabulary object detection

experience.title: Research Assistant
responsibilities: Researched efficient training methods for diffusion models with SNR re-weighting and novel resampling strategies
Developed adaptive timestep resampling distribution and employed reversed Signal-to-Noise Ratio in loss function
Achieved acceleration in convergence speed and improved FID/IS metrics in empirical results
Conducted research on Deep Generative Models: Autoregressive Models, Flow Models, GANs, and Diffusion Probabilistic Models
Authored technical blog post on InstaFlow (one-step diffusion model) published on Viblo, Vietnam's largest tech-sharing platform

experience.title: AI Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Redesigned body-face joint model (BFJDet) with new post-hoc processing for landmark detection in PyTorch
Developed evaluation code using MSE and RMSE metrics for landmark detection performance
Ranked 27/165 in Viettel Programming Challenge - nationwide algorithm programming competition
Researched Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and its applications in view synthesis

details: UTS Academic Excellence International Scholarship - Awarded for outstanding academic achievement
Focusing on advanced machine learning, deep learning architectures, and cutting-edge AI research in generative models and computer vision

education.institution: Hanoi University of Science and Technology
details: The Scholarship Program Sponsored by Electricity of Vietnam (EVN)

blog.title: InstaFlow: One Step to the Cloud with Diffusion
blog.titleVietnamese: InstaFlow: Một bước lên mây với Diffusion?
blog.description: Deep dive into InstaFlow, a breakthrough model that achieves high-quality text-to-image generation in just one step, built on Stable Diffusion. Explores rectified flow mechanisms, reflow techniques, and knowledge distillation for rapid image synthesis.
highlights: Explains Rectified Flow mechanism for straightening probability trajectories
Details the Reflow technique for iterative refinement
Analyzes knowledge distillation applications in diffusion models
Compares U-Net vs. Stacked U-Net architectures

blog.title: Simplex Method
blog.description: Comprehensive tutorial on the Simplex Method for linear programming optimization. Covers the complete algorithm from problem setup to finding optimal solutions, with step-by-step worked examples including constraint conversion, tableau construction, pivoting operations, and solution interpretation.
highlights: Converting inequalities to standard form with slack variables
Identifying pivot elements and performing row operations
Real-world example: job scheduling optimization problem
Detailed mathematical explanations and quotient calculations

blog.title: Marimo: A Modern Alternative to Jupyter Notebooks
blog.titleVietnamese: Doubling Productivity in AI Model Analysis
blog.description: Exploring Marimo's reactive notebook model and how it addresses Jupyter's challenges. This presentation shares my personal journey of switching to Marimo, which doubled my productivity in AI model analysis and significantly improved team collaboration through better reproducibility and interactivity.
highlights: Marimo basics: Introduction to reactive notebook model
Solving Jupyter's challenges: Reproducibility, hidden state, and interactivity
Productivity boost: How switching doubled productivity in AI model analysis
Team collaboration: Improved workflow and sharing capabilities
Interactive demos: Live UI elements and dynamic data visualization

projects.title: Stokkie - AI-Powered Stock Photography Toolkit
projects.description: Full-stack AI productivity platform for stock contributors using React 19, TypeScript, Firebase, and Google Gemini/Imagen APIs. Features node-based Canvas workflow system, multi-modal AI capabilities, and privacy-first RAG chatbot.
detailedPoints: Built a full-stack AI productivity platform for stock contributors using React 19, TypeScript, Firebase, and Google Gemini/Imagen APIs with secure serverless architecture
Designed a node-based Canvas workflow system for visual image pipelines, supporting AI generation, enhancement, inpainting, batch analysis, and multi-image operations
Implemented multi-modal AI features: professional image critique, SEO metadata generation, compliance analysis (model/property release detection, content safety), and text-to-image generation
Developed a privacy-first RAG chatbot with in-browser vector search and image context support for contributor guidance

projects.title: Gaither - Autonomous Recruiting Agent Swarm
projects.description: Multi-agent AI recruiting platform using Python, FastAPI, React 19/Next.js 16, and Claude AI. Features 3-agent pipeline with real-time WebSocket streaming, Weaviate vector database, and AI chatbot for candidate queries.
detailedPoints: Built a multi-agent AI recruiting platform using Python, FastAPI, React 19/Next.js 16, and Claude AI with real-time WebSocket streaming for live agent activity visualization
Architected a 3-agent pipeline (Hunter, Analyzer, Engager) that autonomously discovers GitHub candidates, evaluates code quality with LLM-powered scoring, and generates personalized outreach messages
Integrated Weaviate vector database for semantic candidate search
Developed an AI chatbot with grounding tools enabling recruiters to query candidate data, compare profiles, analyze GitHub activity, and generate interview questions with real-time web search

projects.title: Efficient Training Diffusion Models
projects.description: Research project on efficient training methods for diffusion models with SNR re-weighting and novel timestep resampling strategy. Achieved improved FID/IS metrics and accelerated convergence speed through adaptive distribution.
detailedPoints: Resampled timestep with novel and more adaptive distribution
Employed reversed Signal-to-Noise Ratio in loss function
Achieved acceleration in convergence speed and improved FID/IS metrics
Detailed empirical results demonstrating effectiveness of the approach

projects.title: Rain Removal Analysis
projects.description: Comprehensive analysis of different methods for rain removal task. Fine-tuned Gated Context Aggregation Network and benchmarked against DDPM, GAN, and Transweather using SSIM and PSNR metrics on raindrop-on-lens images.
detailedPoints: Fine-tuned Gated Context Aggregation Network on the task of removing rain drops on lens when capturing landscapes
Benchmarked performance using SSIM and PSNR metrics
Compared results with other models including DDPM, GAN, and Transweather
Provided comprehensive analysis of traditional vs. deep learning approaches

projects.title: Document Summarization
projects.description: Document summarization using deep learning. Implemented Seq2Seq RNN with PyTorch and fine-tuned Google MT5-small on CNN/DailyMail dataset achieving competitive Rouge scores.
detailedPoints: Implemented Sequence to Sequence (Seq2Seq) RNN with PyTorch
Fine-tuned Google MT5-small on processed CNN/DailyMail dataset
Achieved Rouge-1: 28.102, Rouge-2: 13.426, Rouge-L: 24.824 (comparable to GPT-2)
Outperformed implemented Seq2Seq model baseline
